sections.paragraph:
Hezekiah - king of Judah, son of Ahaz

(1) General References to

2Ki 16:20; 2Ki 18:9; 2Ki 19:3; 2Ki 20:1; 2Ki 20:10; 2Ki 20:21

(2) Four Crises in his Life

Crisis of Choice--

Chose to forsake the idols of his father, Ahaz

2Ch 28:24; 2Ch 28:25

and purged the Kingdom from idolatry

2Ki 18:4

Crisis of Invasion--

2Ch 32:1-19

He prayed unto the Lord and was delivered

2Ch 32:20; 2Ch 32:21

Crisis of Sickness--

Obedience furnished him a foundation for prayer and healing

Isa 38:1-5

Crisis of Prosperity--

He manifested pride and displayed his treasures to the ungodly

Isa 39:1-8
